sessions.title: Find a closed session about config changes
sessions.first-prompt: use the session tool to find a session I was working on today about editing config for env and file operations. I think I closed it accidentally. I need the location and the full session-id.

body.text: use the session tool to find a session I was working on today about editing config for env and file operations. I think I closed it accidentally. I need the location and the full session-id.
Found it. Session `00000000-0000-4000-8000-0000000000aa` is where the config design doc (referencing the file/env lane) was worked on. [truncated for fixture]
Subagent search result: matched 1 candidate session by cwd and modified date. [truncated for fixture]
